Short Description:
DRIM Global is an international influencer marketing platform based in Bangalore, India, founded in 2021. The company connects brands with over 250,000 micro-influencers across various social media platforms, focusing on performance-based marketing. DRIM specializes in campaigns that drive measurable results, such as sales and website visits, using a pay-for-results model. 

The platform offers end-to-end campaign management for direct-to-consumer brands, including influencer matching, performance-based pricing, and tailored strategy development. DRIM emphasizes transparency and data-driven approaches, leveraging machine learning and analytical tools to optimize return on investment for brands. With a growing presence in seven countries, DRIM has generated over 12 million measurable actions and earned more than $25 million for influencers. The company aims for significant revenue growth and expansion in the influencer marketing space.
